ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "bday" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "enrolldate" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the university */,
  "expgradate" TEXT /* Expected graduation date of the student */,
  "gender" INTEGER /* Gender of the student (0 = Female, 1 = Male, 2 = Other) */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the student in inches */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the student in pounds */,
  "smoking" INTEGER /* Smoking status of the student (0 = Non-smoker, 1 = Occasional, 2 = Regular) */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of residence (In state, Out of state) */,
  "live_on_campus" INTEGER /* Indicates if the student lives on campus */,
  "commute_time" TEXT /* Commute time of the student (e.g., 15 minutes) */,
  "sleep_time" INTEGER /* Average hours of sleep per night */,
  "study_time" INTEGER /* Average hours spent studying per week */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the student */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "international_student" INTEGER /* Indicates if the student is an international student */,
  "race_ethnicity" TEXT /* Race or ethnicity of the student */,
  "disability_status" TEXT /* Disability status of the student */,
  "financial_aid_status" TEXT /* Financial aid status of the student */,
  "scholarships" TEXT /* Scholarships received by the student */,
  "gpa" REAL /* Current GPA of the student */,
  "admission_date" TEXT /* Date the student was admitted to the university */,
  "high_school" TEXT /* High school attended by the student */,
  "high_school_gpa" REAL /* GPA from high school */,
  "test_scores" TEXT /* Standardized test scores (e.g., SAT, ACT) */,
  "parental_education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education of the student's parents */,
  "first_generation_college_student" INTEGER /* Indicates if the student is a first-generation college student */,
  "veteran_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the student is a veteran */,
  "preferred_pronouns" TEXT /* Preferred pronouns of the student */,
  "graduated" INTEGER /* Indicates if the student has graduated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "majors" (
  "major_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each major entry */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student who has this major */,
  "major_name" TEXT /* Name of the major */,
  "major_rank" TEXT /* Rank of the major (e.g., Freshman, Sophomore) */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Indicates if this is the primary major of the student */,
  "major_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the major */,
  "minor_name" TEXT /* Name of the minor (if applicable) */,
  "minor_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the minor */,
  "concentration" TEXT /* Concentration within the major (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("major_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_majors_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "athletes" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete entry */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student who is an athlete */,
  "sport" TEXT /* Sport the athlete participates in */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the athlete in the sport */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team the athlete is on */,
  "athlete_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the athlete */,
  "position_number" INTEGER /* Number of the position on the team */,
  "captain_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the athlete is a team captain */,
  "scholarship_status" TEXT /* Scholarship status for the athlete */,
  "injury_history" TEXT /* History of injuries */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "academic_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student whose performance is recorded */,
  "english_score" REAL /* Score in English */,
  "reading_score" REAL /* Score in Reading */,
  "math_score" REAL /* Score in Math */,
  "writing_score" REAL /* Score in Writing */,
  "gpa" REAL /* Current GPA */,
  "cumulative_gpa" REAL /* Cumulative GPA */,
  "credits_earned" INTEGER /* Total credits earned */,
  "credits_attempted" INTEGER /* Total credits attempted */,
  "semester_gpa" REAL /* GPA for the current semester */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Current semester (e.g., Fall 2023) */,
  "class_rank" INTEGER /* Class rank */,
  "honors_awards" TEXT /* Honors and awards received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_academic_performance_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "physical_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity entry */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student whose activity is recorded */,
  "sprint_time" REAL /* Time taken to sprint 40 yards */,
  "mile_min_duration" TEXT /* Time taken to run a mile (format: H:MM:SS) */,
  "activity_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the physical activity */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the last recorded physical activity */,
  "activity_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the physical activity (e.g., Daily, Weekly) */,
  "activity_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the physical activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_physical_activity_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campus_life" (
  "life_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campus life entry */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student whose campus life is recorded */,
  "live_on_campus" INTEGER /* Indicates if the student lives on campus */,
  "commute_method" TEXT /* Method of commuting to campus (e.g., Bus, Car, Walking) */,
  "dorm_name" TEXT /* Name of the dormitory (if living on campus) */,
  "room_number" TEXT /* Room number in the dormitory */,
  "roommates" TEXT /* Names of roommates */,
  "meal_plan" TEXT /* Type of meal plan (e.g., Full, Partial) */,
  "campus_job" TEXT /* Job on campus (if applicable) */,
  "work_hours" INTEGER /* Number of hours worked on campus */,
  "campus_involvement" TEXT /* Level of involvement in campus activities (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("life_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campus_life_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "extracurricular_activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each extracurricular activity */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student who participates in the activity */,
  "activity_name" TEXT /* Name of the extracurricular activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of the extracurricular activity (e.g., Club, Organization) */,
  "activity_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the extracurricular activity */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "leader_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the student is a leader in the activity */,
  "hours_per_week" INTEGER /* Number of hours spent on the activity per week */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_extracurricular_activities_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "advisors" (
  "advisor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each advisor */,
  "advisor_name" TEXT /* Name of the advisor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the advisor */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the advisor belongs to */,
  "advisor_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the advisor */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Location of the advisor's office */,
  "office_hours" TEXT /* Office hours of the advisor */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the advisor */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience as an advisor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("advisor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_advisors" (
  "student_advisor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student-advisor relationship */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student */,
  "advisor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the advisor */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the advisor started working with the student */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the advisor ended working with the student */,
  "student_advisor_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the student-advisor relationship */,
  "advisor_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the advisor about the student */,
  "student_satisfaction" TEXT /* Student's satisfaction with the advisor (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_advisor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_advisors_advisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("advisor_id") REFERENCES advisors ("advisor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_advisors_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "advising_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each advising session */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student who attended the session */,
  "advisor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the advisor who conducted the session */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the advising session */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes from the advising session */,
  "session_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the advising session */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of the advising session (e.g., Academic, Career) */,
  "session_location" TEXT /* Location of the advising session */,
  "session_length" INTEGER /* Length of the advising session in minutes */,
  "student_feedback" TEXT /* Feedback from the student about the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_advising_sessions_advisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("advisor_id") REFERENCES advisors ("advisor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_advising_sessions_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_records" (
  "health_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student whose health record is recorded */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the student in inches */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the student in pounds */,
  "smoking_status" INTEGER /* Smoking status of the student (0 = Non-smoker, 1 = Occasional, 2 = Regular) */,
  "last_medical_exam" TEXT /* Date of the last medical examination */,
  "health_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the health record */,
  "blood_type" TEXT /* Blood type of the student */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Allergies of the student */,
  "medications" TEXT /* Medications the student is currently taking */,
  "immunizations" TEXT /* Immunizations received by the student */,
  "health_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the student's health */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("health_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_records_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "graduation_records" (
  "graduation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each graduation record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student who graduated */,
  "graduation_date" TEXT /* Date of graduation */,
  "degree" TEXT /* Degree received */,
  "honors" TEXT /* Honors received (e.g., Summa Cum Laude, Magna Cum Laude) */,
  "graduation_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the graduation record */,
  "thesis_title" TEXT /* Title of the thesis (if applicable) */,
  "thesis_advisor" TEXT /* Advisor of the thesis */,
  "job_placement" TEXT /* Job placement status after graduation */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title after graduation */,
  "job_company" TEXT /* Company where the student is employed after graduation */,
  "job_location" TEXT /* Location of the job after graduation */,
  "salary" TEXT /* Salary after graduation */,
  "graduation_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the graduation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("graduation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_graduation_records_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)
